name: Salad Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp White Vinegar or Lemon Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the outside of a tureen or large bowl with the garlic clove.
2. Spear the garlic clove with a toothpick and place it inside the bowl.
3. Add diced tomatoes, thinly sliced cucumbers, onions, and celery to the bowl.
4. Stir in salad oil and vinegar.
5. Sprinkle with salt, freshly ground pepper, and Accent® Seasoning Mix.
6. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
7. Pour in tomato juice and refrigerate for at least three hours or overnight.
8. When ready to serve, remove the garlic clove.
9. Serve with a spoonful of sour cream placed in the center.
Serves 4
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
